noBorder radius0 none c-row c-wrapper row-pgPNrcAd5g" id="row-pgPNrcAd5g"><!----><!----><div class="inner"><!----><!--[--><!--[--><div class="noBorder radius0 none c-column c-wrapper col-I7aWR9SvY9" custom-code-FwsDzXloXS"><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><div id="custom-code-FwsDzXloXS" class="custom-code-container ccustom-code-FwsDzXloXS"><style>
  /* Remove max-width and center constraints */
  #section-gebIuEC0Oq.container,
  #section-gebIuEC0Oq.inner,
  #section-gebIuEC0Oq.inner-container {
    max-width: 100% !important;
    width: 100% !important;
    margin: 0 !important;
    padding: 0 !important;
  }

  @font-face {
    font-family: "Metropolis";
    src: url("https://ninety-ten.xyzlabs.org/assets/fonts/metropolis/Metropolis-ExtraBold.woff2")
        format("woff2"),
      url("https://ninety-ten.xyzlabs.org/assets/fonts/metropolis/Metropolis-ExtraBold.woff")
        format("woff");
    font-weight: 800;
    font-style: normal;
    font-display: swap;
  }

  * {
    margin: 0;
    -webkit-tap-highlight-color: transparent;
  }

  .main-banner {
    width: 100%;
    /* min-height: 100vh; */
    background: #000000;
    font-family: "Metropolis";
    font-weight: 800;
    position: relative;
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    overflow: hidden;
    cursor: url("https://storage.googleapis.com/msgsndr/XEnBO3uht0yj9asyDlum/media/68ceee55beb0275849858cc2.png"),
      pointer;
  }
  .logo {
    display: flex;
    justify-content: center;
    align-items: center;
  }

  .logo img {
    width: 130px;
    height: 130px;
    z-index: 99;
  }

  /* Prevent selection and tap highlights on all images */
  img {
    -webkit-tap-highlight-color: transparent;
    -webkit-user-select: none;
    user-select: none;
    -webkit-touch-callout: none;
  }

  .characters {
    min-height: 780px;
    display: flex;
    justify-content: center;
    align-items: start;
    position: relative;
    width: 100%;
    margin: 0 auto;
    margin-top: 30px;
    flex: 1;
  }

  .character-1,
  .character-2,
  .character-3 {
    position: relative;
  }

  /* Hover areas for video controls */
  .video-hover-area {
    position: absolute;
    top: 20%;
    left: 50%;
    transform: translateX(-50%);
    width: 110px;
    height: 300px;
    z-index: 15;
  }

  .character-1-play-position {
    position: absolute;
    top: 2%;
    left: 50%;
    transform: translateX(-50%);
    width: 110px;
    height: 300px;
    z-index: 15;
  }

  video {
    height: 500px;
    width: auto;
    object-fit: cover;
    mix-blend-mode: screen;
    /* Prevent selection and tap highlights on videos */
    -webkit-tap-highlight-color: transparent;
    -webkit-user-select: none;
    user-select: none;
    pointer-events: none;
  }

  .character-1 {
    margin-top: 28px;
    right: -200px;
    z-index: 2;
  }

  .character-2 {
    top: -90px;
    z-index: 1;
  }

  .character-3 {
    margin-top: 22px;
    top: -50px;
    left: -250px;
    z-index: 2;
  }

  /* Black overlay layer for characters */
  .background-overlay {
    position: absolute;
    top: 0;
    left: 0;
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
    background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.3);
    z-index: 34;
    pointer-events: none;
  }

  /* Responsive Design */
  .video-hover-area-index {
    z-index: 99999;
  }

  .character-1-play-position {
    top: 4%;
    z-index: 20;
  }

  .character-3-play-position {
    top: 12%;
    left: 55%;
    z-index: 20;
    width: 140px;
    height: 345;
  }

  .characters h1 {
    color: #ffffff;
    position: absolute;
    bottom: 20px;
    left: 50%;
    z-index: 20;
    font-size: 48px;
    font-weight: 900;
    text-align: center;
  }

  .content {
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    justify-content: end;
    align-items: center;
    background-image: url("https://storage.googleapis.com/msgsndr/XEnBO3uht0yj9asyDlum/media/68ceee55ee4040a559d37c17.png");
    background-size: cover;
    background-position: center;
    background-repeat: no-repeat;
    color: #ffffff;
    font-size: 100px;
    height: 360px;
    text-align: center;
    position: absolute;
    bottom: 130px;
    left: 0;
    right: 0;
    z-index: 50;
  }

  .content-text {
    font-size: 36px;
    text-align: center;
    margin-top: 20px;
  }

  /* Preload cursor images using CSS */
  body::before {
    content: "";
    position: absolute;
    width: 0;
    height: 0;
    overflow: hidden;
    z-index: -1;
    background-image: url("https://storage.googleapis.com/msgsndr/XEnBO3uht0yj9asyDlum/media/68ceee55ee4040d1e2d37c16.png"),
      url("https://storage.googleapis.com/msgsndr/XEnBO3uht0yj9asyDlum/media/68ceee550563404c5011777c.png");
  }

  /* Unified button style for both buttons */
  .main-banner .content button,
  #become-a-90-10er,
  #watch-video {
    width: 260px;
    font-size: 22px !important;
    font-weight: 900 !important;
    font-family: "Metropolis", sans-serif;
    padding: 20px 30px;
    border-radius: 8px;
    outline: none;
    border: none;
    transition: all 0.3s ease;
    z-index: 99999;
    cursor: url("https://storage.googleapis.com/msgsndr/XEnBO3uht0yj9asyDlum/media/68ceee55ee4040d1e2d37c16.png"),
      pointer;
    text-align: center;
  }

  #become-a-90-10er {
    background: #f78a8c;
    color: white;
  }

  #become-a-90-10er:hover {
    cursor: url("https://storage.googleapis.com/msgsndr/XEnBO3uht0yj9asyDlum/media/68ceee55ee4040d1e2d37c16.png"),
      pointer;
    background: #fc9c9e;
  }

  #become-a-90-10er:active,
  #become-a-90-10er.clicking {
    cursor: url("https://storage.googleapis.com/msgsndr/XEnBO3uht0yj9asyDlum/media/68ceee550563404c5011777c.png"),
      pointer !important;
  }

  #watch-video {
    background: #ffffff;
    color: #000000;
    /* margin-top: 20px; */
  }

  #watch-video:hover {
    background: #f1f1f1;
  }

  #watch-video:active {
    cursor: url("https://storage.googleapis.com/msgsndr/XEnBO3uht0yj9asyDlum/media/68ceee550563404c5011777c.png"),
      pointer !important;
  }

  /* Custom glowing cursor */
  .cursor {
    position: fixed;
    width: 100px;
    height: 100px;
    border-radius: 50%;
    background: radial-gradient(
      circle,
      rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.4) 0,
      rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.3) 10%,
      rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.2) 20%,
      rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1) 30%,
      rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.08) 40%,
      rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.06) 50%,
      rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.04) 60%,
      rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.02) 70%,
      rgba(255, 255, 255, 0) 100%,
      transparent 0
    );
    z-index: 99999;
    filter: blur(20px);
  }

  .cursor.hover {
    transform: translate(-50%, -50%) scale(1.5);
    box-shadow: 0 0 15px rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.8),
      0 0 25px rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.6), 0 0 35px rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.4);
  }

  .torch {
    position: fixed;
    top: 0;
    left: 0;
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
    pointer-events: none;
    background: radial-gradient(
      circle 350px at var(--x, 100%) var(--y, 100%),
      rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.8) 30%,
      rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.2) 40%,
      rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) 80%
    );

    mix-blend-mode: overlay;
    transition: background 0.1s ease;
    z-index: 99998;
  }

  /* Mobile Hero Section */
  .mobile-hero {
    display: none; /* Hidden on desktop */
    width: 100%;
    text-align: center;
    margin-top: 10px;
  }

  .mobile-hero img {
    width: 100%;
    height: 220px;
    object-fit: cover;
    border-radius: 8px;
  }

  .mobile-content-heading {
    display: none;
  }

  .buttons-container {
    display: flex;
    justify-content: center;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 10px;
    margin-top: 40px;
  }

  @media (max-width: 1115px) {
    .content {
      font-size: 75px;
      bottom: 150px;
    }
  }

  /* Mobile Responsive Design */
  @media (max-width: 786px) {
    /* Hide videos section on mobile */
    .background-overlay {
      display: none;
    }
    .characters {
      display: none;
    }

    /* Show mobile hero on mobile */
    .mobile-hero {
      display: block;
    }

    /* Adjust content for mobile */
    .content {
      background-image: none;
      height: 240px;
      bottom: 140px;
      font-size: 50px;
      position: relative;
      margin-top: auto;
    }

    .content-text {
      font-size: 21px;
    }
    .mobile-hero img {
      height: 450px;
    }
    .logo img {
      margin-top: 35px;
      width: 140px;
      height: 140px;
    }

    /* Remove font-size/weight overrides for buttons on mobile */
    #become-a-90-10er,
    #watch-video {
      font-size: 22px !important;
      font-weight: 900 !important;
      padding: 20px 30px;
      border-radius: 8px;
      /* margin-top: 40px; */
    }
    #watch-video {
      /* margin-top: 20px; */
    }

    /* Hide torch and cursor effects on mobile */
    .torch {
      display: none !important;
    }

    .cursor {
      display: none !important;
    }
  }

  @media (max-width: 630px) {
    /* .main-banner {
        min-height: 100dvh;
      } */
    .content {
      background-image: none;
      font-size: 30px; /* Even smaller for small phones */
      height: 240px;
      bottom: 115px;
      position: relative;
      margin-top: auto;
    }
    .content-heading {
      display: none;
    }
    .mobile-hero {
      padding-left: 3px;
    }
    .mobile-hero img {
      height: 250px;
    }
    .logo img {
      margin-top: 10px;
      width: 140px;
      height: 140px;
    }

    .buttons-container {
      flex-direction: column;
      margin-top: 40px;
    }

    /* Remove font-size/weight overrides for buttons on small screens */
    #become-a-90-10er,
    #watch-video {
      width: 250px;
      height: 52px;
      font-size: 18px !important;
      font-weight: 900 !important;
      border-radius: 5px;
      padding: 0;
      margin-top: 0px;
    }

    .mobile-content-heading {
      display: flex;
      flex-direction: column;
      font-size: 46px;
      color: white;
      text-align: center;
      margin-top: 0px;
    }
  }
</style>

<div class="torch" id="torch" style="display: none;"></div>
<div class="cursor" id="cursor" style="display: none;"></div>

<div class="main-banner">
  <div class="logo">
    <img src="https://storage.googleapis.com/msgsndr/XEnBO3uht0yj9asyDlum/media/68ceee55beb0277baa858cc1.png" alt="logo">
  </div>

  <div class="mobile-content-heading">
    <span>90% AI</span> <span>10% HUMAN</span>
  </div>

  <div class="mobile-hero">
    <img src="https://storage.googleapis.com/msgsndr/XEnBO3uht0yj9asyDlum/media/68ceee55ee404049bad37c18.png" alt="90-10 AI Human Hero">
  </div>

  <div class="characters">
    <div class="character-1">
      <div class="video-hover-area character-1-play-position" data-video="character-1"></div>
      <video src="https://storage.googleapis.com/msgsndr/XEnBO3uht0yj9asyDlum/media/68cee32abeb027505183ef25.webm" muted="" preload="metadata"></video>
    </div>

    <div class="character-2">
      <div class="video-hover-area" data-video="character-2"></div>
      <video src="https://storage.googleapis.com/msgsndr/XEnBO3uht0yj9asyDlum/media/68cee32a17e965247eb85f47.webm" muted="" preload="metadata"></video>
    </div>

    <div class="character-3">
      <div class="video-hover-area character-3-play-position" data-video="character-3"></div>
      <video src="https://storage.googleapis.com/msgsndr/XEnBO3uht0yj9asyDlum/media/68cee32a32a0203f72d38c08.webm" muted="" preload="metadata"></video>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="content">
    <div class="content-heading">90% AI 10% HUMAN</div>
    <div class="content-text">100% DOING WHAT YOU LOVE</div>
    <div class="buttons-container">
      <button id="become-a-90-10er" class="ghl-popup-trigger">
        Become a 90-10er
      </button>
      <button id="watch-video">Watch Video</button>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<script>
  (function(){
  const cursor = document.getElementById("cursor");
  const torch = document.getElementById("torch");
  const videos = document.querySelectorAll("video");
  const hoverAreas = document.querySelectorAll(".video-hover-area");
  const mainContainer = document.querySelector(".main-banner");

  if(!cursor || !torch) return;

  document.addEventListener("mousemove", (e) => {
    cursor.style.left = e.clientX + "px";
    cursor.style.top = e.clientY + "px";
    torch.style.setProperty("--x", e.clientX + "px");
    torch.style.setProperty("--y", e.clientY + "px");
  });

  let isInside = false;
  torch.style.display = "none";
  cursor.style.display = "none";

  mainContainer.addEventListener("mouseenter", () => {
    isInside = true;
    cursor.style.display = "block";
  });

  mainContainer.addEventListener("mouseleave", () => {
    isInside = false;
    torch.style.display = "none";
    cursor.style.display = "none";
  });

  hoverAreas.forEach((area, i) => {
    const video = videos[i];
    const character = area.closest('[class^="character-"]');
    let reverseTimer = null;

    area.addEventListener("mouseenter", () => {
      if(reverseTimer){ clearInterval(reverseTimer); reverseTimer=null; }
      video.currentTime = 0;
      video.play();
      if(character.classList.contains("character-2")){
        character.style.zIndex="3";
      }
      if(isInside) torch.style.display="block";
    });

    area.addEventListener("mouseleave", () => {
      if(character.classList.contains("character-2")){
        video.pause(); video.currentTime=0;
        character.style.zIndex="1";
      } else {
        video.pause();
        if(video.ended || video.currentTime >= video.duration - 0.1){
          video.currentTime = video.duration - 1;
        }
        if(video.currentTime>0){
          reverseTimer=setInterval(()=>{
            video.currentTime -= 0.05;
            if(video.currentTime<=0){
              clearInterval(reverseTimer);
              video.currentTime=0;
            }
          },30);
        }
      }
      torch.style.display="none";
    });
  });

  document.addEventListener("mouseleave", () => {
    cursor.style.display="none";
    torch.style.display="none";
    isInside=false;
  });

  const button=document.getElementById("become-a-90-10er");
  if(button){
    button.addEventListener("mouseenter",()=>{ torch.style.display="none"; });
  }

  videos.forEach(v=>{
    v.addEventListener("mouseenter",()=>{ torch.style.display="block"; });
  });

  document.addEventListener("visibilitychange",()=>{
    if(document.hidden){
      torch.style.display="none";
      cursor.style.opacity="0";
    } else {
      cursor.style.opacity="1";
    }
  });
})();
  
  document.getElementById("become-a-90-10er").addEventListener("click", () => {
    const ghlBtn = document.getElementById("button-6bfJO5i9UYgQ_btn");
    if (ghlBtn) ghlBtn.click();
  });

  document.getElementById("watch-video").addEventListener("click", () => {
    const currentSection = document.querySelector("#section-gebIuEC0Oq");
    if (currentSection && currentSection.nextElementSibling) {
      currentSection.nextElementSibling.scrollIntoView({ behavior: "smooth" });
    }
  });
</script></div><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----></div><!--]--><!--]--></div><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----></div><!--]--><!--]--></div><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----></div><!--]--><!--]--></div><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----></div><!--]--><!--[--><div  (function(){ 
   const cursor = document.getElementById("cursor"); 
   const torch = document.getElementById("torch"); 
   const videos = document.querySelectorAll("video"); 
   const hoverAreas = document.querySelectorAll(".video-hover-area"); 
   const mainContainer = document.querySelector(".main-banner"); 
  
   if(!cursor || !torch) return; 
  
   document.addEventListener("mousemove", (e) => { 
     cursor.style.left = e.clientX + "px"; 
     cursor.style.top = e.clientY + "px"; 
     torch.style.setProperty("--x", e.clientX + "px"); 
     torch.style.setProperty("--y", e.clientY + "px"); 
   }); 
  
   let isInside = false; 
   torch.style.display = "none"; 
   cursor.style.display = "none"; 
  
   mainContainer.addEventListener("mouseenter", () => { 
     isInside = true; 
     cursor.style.display = "block"; 
   }); 
  
   mainContainer.addEventListener("mouseleave", () => { 
     isInside = false; 
     torch.style.display = "none"; 
     cursor.style.display = "none"; 
   }); 
  
   hoverAreas.forEach((area, i) => { 
     const video = videos[i]; 
     const character = area.closest('[class^="character-"]'); 
     let reverseTimer = null; 
  
     area.addEventListener("mouseenter", () => { 
       if(reverseTimer){ clearInterval(reverseTimer); reverseTimer=null; } 
       video.currentTime = 0; 
       video.play(); 
       if(character.classList.contains("character-2")){ 
         character.style.zIndex="3"; 
       } 
       if(isInside) torch.style.display="block"; 
     }); 
  
     area.addEventListener("mouseleave", () => { 
       if(character.classList.contains("character-2")){ 
         video.pause(); video.currentTime=0; 
         character.style.zIndex="1"; 
       } else { 
         video.pause(); 
         if(video.ended || video.currentTime >= video.duration - 0.1){ 
           video.currentTime = video.duration - 1; 
         } 
         if(video.currentTime>0){ 
           reverseTimer=setInterval(()=>{ 
             video.currentTime -= 0.05; 
             if(video.currentTime<=0){ 
               clearInterval(reverseTimer); 
               video.currentTime=0; 
             } 
           },30); 
         } 
       } 
       torch.style.display="none"; 
     }); 
   }); 
  
   document.addEventListener("mouseleave", () => { 
     cursor.style.display="none"; 
     torch.style.display="none"; 
     isInside=false; 
   }); 
  
   const button=document.getElementById("become-a-90-10er"); 
   if(button){ 
     button.addEventListener("mouseenter",()=>{ torch.style.display="none"; }); 
   } 
  
   videos.forEach(v=>{ 
     v.addEventListener("mouseenter",()=>{ torch.style.display="block"; }); 
   }); 
  
   document.addEventListener("visibilitychange",()=>{ 
     if(document.hidden){ 
       torch.style.display="none"; 
       cursor.style.opacity="0"; 
     } else { 
       cursor.style.opacity="1"; 
     } 
   }); 
 })(); 
 </script>
